pages.text: Biomancy is a loop, not a tech tree. Everything circles one substance — $(flesh)Living Flesh$() — and once you can make that reliably, the rest opens at once.
pages.title: The Shape of the Craft

pages.text: $(bold)The loop, in five turns:$()$(br)$(li)$(bold)Harvest$() organic parts from the mobs you already kill.$(li)Craft a $(bold)Primordial Core$() from common meat, then raise a $(bold)Primordial Cradle$().$(li)$(bold)Feed$() the Cradle. It births $(bold)Flesh Blobs$().$(li)$(bold)Kill$() the blobs for $(bold)Living Flesh$() — the brain of every machine.$(li)$(bold)Build$() the machines. They process your harvest back into parts, fuel, and serums — which feed the Cradle again.

$(bold)Two resources thread through all of it:$()$(br2)$(flesh)Living Flesh$() is the core component — no machine, weapon, or piece of armor is built without one.$(br2)$(flesh)Nutrients$() are the fuel. Every machine runs on a Nutrient reserve, and so do the living weapons. You make Nutrients by feeding food to a $(l:3_machines/digester)Digester$().
pages.title: The Two Threads
